title: Petco Q3 2025: $1.5B Net Sales, EBITDA Outlook to $397M
text: Petco Q3 2025: $1.5B Net Sales, EBITDA Outlook to $397M. Q3 2025 Financial Results: Petco reported third quarter 2025 financial results showing net sales of approximately $1.5 billion. The company provided guidance for full year 2025 EBITDA with an outlook around $397 million at the midpoint. Operational Progress: The company demonstrated continued focus on cost management and operational improvements. Comparable sales trends remained challenging, but the company showed resilience in margin management. Strategic Execution: Management highlighted progress on transformation initiatives driving operational efficiency. The company continued investments in high-margin services businesses. Balance Sheet: The company maintained solid liquidity position and continued debt reduction efforts. Full Year Outlook: 2025 guidance indicated the company was on track to deliver meaningful EBITDA improvements compared to prior year results. The company expected continued positive momentum in profitability metrics.
